title: HUDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HUDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
